label: 55_culture_misconduct_ethical_ethics
description: Discussions on misconduct risk, ethical behavior, and cultural reform within the financial industry, emphasizing the role of supervision and legal support. These dialogues highlight the importance of an ethical culture for preventing misconduct and enhancing overall service quality.

earliest_articles.title: How to rebuild trust
earliest_articles.excerpt: For all its mathematical models, finance is not physics. In fact, it runs pretty much on faith (Carlin et al. 2009), and can give rise to highly emotional reactions. This was much in evidence during the latest financial crisis. Trust, another name for faith, was shattered among financial actors when Lehman Brothers…
